name: Terego
notes: Established 2020-07-01, split from Arua District. Missing from all three sources originally used for the 135-district baseline (Statoids, Wikipedia, and the MoLG-style PDF list) — confirmed as a real gap and added after cross-referencing the EC's June 2022 verified administrative units count (146 district-equivalent units, not 135).

name: Kampala
notes: Uganda's capital city, occupying the same tier as a district. Administered by the Kampala Capital City Authority (KCCA) under the KCCA Act 2010 (KCCA is the governing authority, not a type of administrative unit). Divided into 5 Divisions rather than counties/subcounties.
